description: Named event-pattern sets for transcript consumers (adoption-metrics harness, mine-retrieval-misses). Consumers select a set by name; tool lists and command shapes live here as data so protocols can be re-tested without editing consumer code.

retrieval-call.description: Bash invocations of lore retrieval commands. Each regex's first non-null capture group is the query string used for the retrieval-log join.

derivation.description: Source exploration that derives what retrieval failed to supply: non-sidechain Grep/Glob/Read tool_use, plus Explore/general-purpose agent spawns. Distinct from the Phase 1 adoption bypass set.
